---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new language/framework example or an improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
e.g. "Add a Go example", "Cover the OpenAI Agents SDK", "Document streaming for Laravel".

**Why**
What problem does it solve or which stack does it unblock?

**Notes**
Any docs links or gotchas the implementer should know.
